## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Environment
- **OS**: Windows 10/11 (specify build if known)
- **Application Version**: 
- **STB Model**: MediaStar 4030 (firmware version if known)
- **Network Setup**: [ ] Direct [ ] VPN [ ] Proxy [ ] Other
- **Ollama**: [ ] Installed [ ] Not installed [ ] Not sure

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📋 Application Log
```
Paste relevant log entries here
```

## 📊 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Debug Information
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar problems
- [ ] I have tried the latest version
- [ ] I have tested with a clean configuration
- [ ] I have checked the troubleshooting guide

## 💡 Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.
